summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of 10X Hotels book website. All core functionality working correctly including navigation, PDF buttons, JotForm integration, and responsive design.

design_issues.issue: Footer links use .html extensions instead of React Router paths
design_issues.details: Footer links point to invitation.html and signup.html instead of /invitation and /signup

passed_tests: Home page loads with hero section and book title '10X Hotels'
3D book cover image displays correctly with hover effects
Read Now button opens PDF in new tab with correct target='_blank'
Download PDF button has correct download attribute
Navigation to Invitation page works via React Router
Invitation page displays with light theme and drop cap styling
Continue the Journey button navigates to Sign-up page
Sign-up page displays JotForm iframe correctly
Mobile navigation hamburger menu toggles properly
Mobile menu auto-closes when navigation links are clicked
Responsive design works across mobile (390px), tablet (768px), and desktop (1920px)
Typography uses Cormorant Garamond for headings and Outfit for body text
Scroll animations and reveal effects work properly
Footer displays with correct branding and copyright
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: Update footer links to use React Router paths (/invitation, /signup) instead of .html extensions for consistency with navigation
